rows.label: tev010101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Adelbert about Union Drive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_SEL0021
rows.name: Find out what Adelbert is upset about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Adelbert about the Avalanche.

rows.label: tev010101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Adelbert about Overeds.

rows.label: tev010101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Adelbert about your
bonding with your comrades.

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0001
rows.name:
It isn't just a base for us Avalanche—lots
of Unions have their headquarters here on
Union Drive. ...Hence the name, I suppose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Pathfinder are right next door to us,
and the Companion are across the way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0003
rows.name:
You just arrived here, right? Then I
take it you haven't chosen a Union yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0004
rows.name:
You'll see logos like this one on the
walls and floors of each Union's base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0005
rows.name:
When you decide on a Union, look for the building
with its logo. A Union base is like a BLADE's second
home—a place where you and your friends can gather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0010
rows.name:
After we landed here, a young
whelp by the name of Dirk was
assigned to our team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Kid's so green, he smells
like fresh-cut grass.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Avalancher work is dangerous even
at the best of times, and I worry
the kid won't be able to hack it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Apparently he was some sort of expert marksman in
college, but we're not shooting hay bales here. I
don't know how he'll perform in a real fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Still, as team leader, I have to take
responsibility for keeping him safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0020
rows.name:
As Avalanche, our job is to
exterminate the especially dangerous
indigens that roam this world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Some of 'em are so tough, it
would take a full squad of BLADEs
just to make it a fair fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Most of the Coalition's veteran
fighters were assigned to this Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0023
rows.name:
On my own team, I'm lucky to serve with
Fine and Grette—two career soldiers that
may well have been born wearing camo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0024
rows.name:
They both have mouths that would make a sailor
blush, but there's no one you'd rather have watching
your back when you're bringing down a monster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Oh, I got some stories. There's a mutant dilus that
lives just north of Rust Lake in Nightglow Forest,
for one. It's an unimaginably vicious piece of work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0031
rows.name:
We pumped that thing full of enough
lead to supply a pencil factory,
and it STILL wouldn't go down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Eventually it went berserk—got even
stronger than before. Turned into a
flurry of death and destruction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I wouldn't be here talking to you today if it
weren't for Fine and Grette—two buddies I've
been serving with since my Coalition days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Overeds are in a whole different league from normal
indigens. If you're thinking of challenging one, you
better make damn sure you know what you're doing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0040
rows.name:
Since we arrived, I've racked up lots of combat ops
with Fine and Grette—two allies I trust with my life.
The more we fight, the stronger our bonding becomes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0041
rows.name:
As a result, we're an order of magnitude
stronger whenever we fight together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0042
rows.name:
Bonding is the strongest weapon you
have, and more powerful than any piece
of gear you can buy— including a Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev010101_MSG0043
rows.name:
When you're fighting alongside Elma and the
other trusted comrades on your team, it's
a weapon you all must forge together.[ST:wait ]
